headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，多部大片蓄势待发
headlineEn: 'Obsession' Tops Today's Trends, Multiple Blockbusters on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：热门电影《痴迷》持续霸榜，《权力的游戏前传：龙族》热度不减；本周新片《福尔摩斯小姐3》等引期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: 'Obsession' continues to dominate, 'Game of Thrones Prequel: Dragon' remains hot; new films like 'Enola Holmes 3' generate buzz this week.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，但《福尔摩斯小姐3》等备受关注
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but 'Enola Holmes 3' and others are highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》《穿普拉达的女王2》位列本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' trend this week

industryHighlights.text: 未来新片《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等引期待
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming films like 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' generate excitement

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》《海洋奇缘：启航》等即将上映
industryHighlights.en: 'Odyssey' and 'Moana: Setting Sail' are coming soon
